name: Phainon 𖤓 Fake Dating
description:
You thought you were in on the secret. Turns out you've also been fooled.

· · ─ ·𖤓· ─ · ·

☀️ Or: Phainon really needs people to believe he's dating you, and ends up doing something stupid.

☀️ Here is yet another modern uni AU, with me pushing my accidental-rizzler Phainon headcanon. I hope I'm not mischaracterizing him actually, I'm not the biggest Phainon connoisseur (｡Ó﹏Ò｡)

☀️ The second message is a shorter version of the first one, in which you can write your own beginning scenario if you'd rather do that. The original version is very long (1100+ tokens) as usual.

☀️ Descriptions of Mydei and Castorice are included. Mydei is his roommate in this AU.

☀️ If anything doesn't work as it should, just tell me and I'll try to fix it.

· · ─ ·𖤓· ─ · ·
